explanations.8: opacity: 0 means the button starts invisible but still takes up space; visibility: hidden on line 9 makes it not take up any space at all.
explanations.10: This transition rule makes both the opacity and visibility properties smoothly animate over 0.4 seconds when they change.
explanations.11: z-index: 1000 ensures this button sits on top of almost everything else on the page so it's always clickable.
explanations.20: border-radius: 50% turns the square image into a perfect circle.
explanations.37: The 'forwards' keyword means the image stays in its final state after the animation ends, rather than snapping back to how it looked before.
